steps.title: Simplify absolute values when a is negative
steps.content:
Since $a \lt 0$, both $16a$ and $7a$ are negative. Therefore $|16a| = -16a$ and $|7a| = -7a$. Substituting into the function:
$$f(16a) = \frac{-16a}{a} - 13 = -16 - 13 = -29$$
$$f(7a) = \frac{-7a}{a} - 13 = -7 - 13 = -20$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $580$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $580$.
